steps.description: Create an isolated model-local Python 3.10 environment without mutating host conda state.
Prepare the local environment for dependency resolution.
Install the repo-native package entrypoint plus Hugging Face download tooling.
Fetch the official weight bundle into the expected local directory.
Run import/load/infer/contract against the declared VAD fixture and capture structured output.

notes: ffmpeg is not required for the chosen fixture because the asset already satisfies the repository input format.
No upstream patch is planned; wrapper generation is deferred until contract validation succeeds.
